title: Vanilla Reformed
description: Only Client-Side mods with extra optimized. The ultimate version of Vanilla Minecraft.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0714da57c7dd86e4d044a43de1835129a7366025.png)
# 🌿 **Vanilla Reformed**
A client-side optimization and visual enhancement modpack built for Minecraft

## 🎯 **Purpose**
Vanilla Reformed aims to provide a better Minecraft experience without altering the core gameplay. It enhances performance for smoother gameplay and introduces visual improvements to make the game more immersive — all while staying true to the vanilla spirit.

## 🔧 **Features**
100% client-side only mods — fully compatible with multiplayer servers.

Performance-focused: Higher FPS and faster load times.

Visual improvements: Enhanced UI, smoother animations, and more vibrant visuals.

Lightweight and easy to install, suitable even for low-end systems.

## 🔄 **Version Support**
Currently supports 1.21.6, 1.21.7 and 1.21.8 but will be updated as mod compatibility expands to newer versions.
